name: Leidos Holdings, Inc.
summary: Part I OUR COMPANY Leidos Holdings, Inc. (Leidos), a Delaware corporation, is a holding company whose direct 100%-owned subsidiary and principal operating company is Leidos, Inc. Leidos was founded in 1969 by physicist Dr. Robert Beyster. Since our founding 57 years ago, we have applied our expertise in science, research and engineering in rapidly-evolving technologies and markets to solve complex problems of global concern. We use the terms we, us and our to refer collectively to Leidos Holding...
